title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Dry Nose
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils contains thymol, carvacrol, and borneol as its active constituents. These compounds have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe a dry nose. The anti-inflammatory properties of borneol and carvacrol reduce swelling in the nasal passages, while thymol's antimicrobial properties combat infections that can cause dryness and irritation.
